title: Savory Crispy Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A crowd-pleasing Mediterranean dish featuring herbal and crispy lamb kebabs, perfect for a high-protein meal. This recipe combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with a crispy exterior and a tender interior.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
Flip the skewers over and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until crispy and cooked through.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the kebabs by slicing the lamb into thin strips and serving it in the pita bread with tomato, red onion, and your choice of toppings.
